center.name: 欣里希·利希滕施泰因
center.summary: 欣里希·利希滕施泰因是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括埃及夜鹰、裸頸鸛、黄嘴犀鸟等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-crowned tityra (Tityra inquisitor) is a medium-sized passerine bird. It is found in Mexico, every Central American country except El Salvador, and every mainland South American country except Chile and Uruguay.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The desert sparrow (Passer simplex) is a species of bird in the sparrow family Passeridae, found in the Sahara Desert of northern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The greyish mourner (Rhytipterna simplex) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Levaillant's cisticola (Cisticola tinniens), also known as the tinkling cisticola, is a small passerine bird which is native to marshlands in the uplands of Africa, southwards of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Oenanthe lugens lugens - MHNT The mourning wheatear (Oenanthe lugens) is a bird, one of 14 species of wheatear found in northern Africa and the Middle East

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The short-tailed antthrush (Chamaeza campanisona) is a species of bird in the family Formicariidae. It is found in every mainland South American country except Chile, French Guiana, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The striped woodcreeper (Xiphorhynchus obsoletus) is a species of bird in the subfamily Dendrocolaptinae of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-rumped monjita (Xolmis velatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and as a vagrant to Argentina.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2021 |title=Hemimacronyx chloris |volume=2021 |article-number=e.T22718444A180132223 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2021-3.RLTS.T22718444A180132223.en |access-date=20 December 2025}} | genus = Hemimacronyx | parent_authority = Roberts, 1922 | species = chloris | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1842) | synonyms = Anthus chloris (protonym) }} The yellow-breasted pipit (Hemimacronyx chloris) is a species of bird in the pipit and wagtail family Motacillidae that is found in the Drakensberg region of South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Egyptian nightjar (Caprimulgus aegyptius) is a medium-small nightjar which occurs in south west Asia and north Africa and winters in tropical Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: panamenseChagres River, Panama | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Philohydor | parent_authority = Lanyon, W, 1984 | species = lictor | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1823) | synonyms = * Lanius lictor (protonym) * Pitangus lictor | range_map = Philohydor lictor map.svg }} The lesser kiskadee (Philohydor lictor) is a species of passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Panama and every mainland South American country except Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay, though only as a vagrant in Argentina.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|250px|Rhodospiza obsoleta The desert finch (Rhodospiza obsoleta), sometimes called Lichtenstein's desert finch, is a large brown true finch found in southern Eurasia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: isabellina in Palestine | taxon = Ammomanes deserti | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1823) | subdivision_ranks = Subspecies | subdivision = See text | range_map = Ammomanes deserti distribution map.png | range_map_caption = range | synonyms = * Alauda deserti }} The desert lark (Ammomanes deserti) breeds in deserts and semi-deserts from Morocco to western India

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African firefinch (Lagonosticta rubricata), also called the blue-billed firefinch, is a common species of estrildid finch found in many parts of Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Passer luteus | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1823) | synonyms_ref = | synonyms = * Fringilla lutea Lichtenstein, 1823 }} The Sudan golden sparrow (Passer luteus) is a small species of bird in the sparrow family found in sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The jabiru ( or ; Jabiru mycteria) is a large stork found in the Americas from Mexico to Argentina, except west of the Andes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern yellow-billed hornbill (Tockus leucomelas) is a hornbill found in southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-rumped waxbill (Estrilda troglodytes) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Southern Africa
